codeReview.summary: Pass. The new suppression in packages/webapp/src/scoops/agent-bridge.ts fixes the real runtime path that round 2 identified: ScoopContext.init() surfaces the specific init error via onError, ScoopContext.prompt() then emits the generic "Agent not initialized" follow-up and returns normally, and the bridge now keeps that later callback from overwriting the earlier specific message before the existing post-prompt promotion/catch handling runs. The added regression test in packages/webapp/tests/scoops/agent-bridge.test.ts matches that callback order exactly (init onError + normal return, then prompt onError + normal return), while the earlier 17ff0ae tests still cover the throwing prompt path. I did not find a remaining blocker or a new real regression in the reviewed diff.

summary: Pass. This rerun resolves the prior blocker: the fix now targets the real init-failure callback sequence instead of only the mocked prompt-throw path, and the new regression test matches the ScoopContext.init()/prompt() order that previously collapsed VAL-LIVE-010 to the generic error.
